channel.title: Shehacks on Zerofrost
channel.description: Recent content in Shehacks on Zerofrost

item.title: SheHacks-IntervarsityCTF
item.description: This past weekend I got the opportunity to participate in the #ShehacksKEintervasityCTF which was amazing. I played as Team BitClan with my teammates and we managed to scoop second position. The challenges were amazing and I got to learn a thing or two.In this writeup,I will be explaining how I solved the challenges. Note that this is the approach I took to solve the challenges and not necessarily how they are supposed to be solved.
